subcodes.first_line: O thou who art set ablaze by the fire kindled in the divine Lote-Tree! Praise be to God that thou hast drawn nigh unto the blessed Vale illumined by the light of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مصطلی بنار موقده در سدره ربانیه حمد خدا را که از زادی ایمن بقعه مبارکه نور هدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @light and darkness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
